subcodes.first_line: O ye who thirst for the fountain of eternal life! The morn hath broken, and 'Abdu'l-Bahá is filled with joy and gladness in remembrance of you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنگان چشمه حیوان بامداد است و عبدالبهاء بیاد شما مسرور و شادمان فرح اندر
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement, @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
